framing: Recent graduate targeting first data analyst role

jd.title: Junior Data Analyst

requirements.text: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, or related field
Proficiency in SQL for data extraction and manipulation
Experience with Python or R for data analysis
Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, or Looker)
Strong Excel skills including pivot tables, VLOOKUP, and basic macros
Internship or co-op experience in analytics or business intelligence
Knowledge of statistical methods (regression, hypothesis testing)
Experience with cloud data platforms (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift)
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Ability to translate data findings into business recommendations

responsibilities: Extract and analyze data from multiple sources to support client engagements
Build dashboards and visualizations for executive-level reporting
Perform ad-hoc analyses to answer business questions from consulting teams
Clean, transform, and validate datasets for analytical use
Present findings and recommendations to senior consultants and clients
Document analytical methodologies and maintain data dictionaries

expected_output.summary: Recent Statistics graduate from University of Toronto with internship experience in business intelligence and data analysis. Proficient in SQL, Python, and Tableau with hands-on experience building dashboards for executive reporting. Completed capstone project analyzing 2M+ retail transactions using regression and clustering methods. Strong communicator with experience presenting data findings to non-technical stakeholders.

experience.title: Data Analytics Intern
bullets: Built 4 Tableau dashboards tracking customer acquisition metrics for retail banking division
Wrote SQL queries to extract and clean data from 3 source systems (Oracle, PostgreSQL, internal data lake)
Performed cohort analysis identifying 15% drop-off in mobile banking activation, leading to UX redesign
Presented weekly analytics updates to senior manager and 6-person marketing analytics team

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Analyzed 2M+ retail transaction records using Python (pandas, scikit-learn) for capstone research project
Applied regression and K-means clustering to identify customer segmentation patterns
Created data visualizations using matplotlib and Tableau for thesis defense presentation

experience.company: Student Data Club — University of Toronto
experience.title: VP Analytics
bullets: Organized 12 data analytics workshops teaching SQL and Python to 80+ undergraduate students
Led team of 5 students in campus-wide survey analysis project

deliberate_flaws: No Power BI or Looker experience
No Excel macros experience (only pivot tables, VLOOKUP)
R only from coursework, not practical
Very thin work history — relies on academic projects
